title: 10 Herbal Tinctures For Vaginitis
description: Echinacea purpurea tinctures contains compounds like alkylamides, glycosides, and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. These properties can help alleviate vaginitis symptoms by reducing inflammation and fighting off infections caused by bacteria, yeast, or other pathogens.
